mapper.sql: id, code, workspace_id, project_code, workflow_definition_code, name, task_type, script_code, config_json, description, input_params, output_params, priority, delay_time, retry_times, retry_interval, timeout, timeout_enabled, timeout_notify_strategy, is_enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_task_definition where code = #{code} limit 1
select from t_r_task_definition where script_code = #{scriptCode} limit 1
